title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: AfriAtlas package provides tools ecologists, conservationists, bird enthusiasts download, process, visualize bird atlas data African Bird Atlas Project (ABAP) associated country-level projects.

title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: Since development version, users install package directly GitHub.
code: # Install dependencies if missing install.packages(c("devtools", "rnaturalearth", "ggplot2", "sf", "cowplot"))  # Install AfriAtlas from GitHub (Replace 'username' with your GitHub username) devtools::install_github("bdanmallam/AfriAtlas") library(AfriAtlas) library(sf) library(ggplot2)

title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: mapping functions require numeric Species Codes (e.g., 11491 Common Bulbul). AfriAtlas provides three tools help manage codes.

what: A. Lookup a Code by Name: get_species_code()
title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: know English common name, can quickly retrieve code. function case-sensitive.
code: # Find code for Common Bulbul code <- get_species_code("Common Bulbul") print(code)  # Find code for Pin-tailed Whydah get_species_code("Pin-tailed Whydah")

title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: unsure spelling want browse full species codes, function opens internal dataset RStudio Viewer. (Note: function works interactive sessions).

title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: running batch process, best practice review list codes used. show_codes() function simple utility . Note primary mapping function, map_species(), stop execution list exceeds Spp 10 codes.
code: # Example list of species codes (e.g., common African species) my_species_list <- c(129, 311, 437, 846, 11491, 1168)  # Check the list size show_codes(my_species_list)  # Example of a list exceeding the limit (Will stop map_species() execution) # show_codes(c(1:12))

title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: map_coverage() function generates map showing intensity bird atlas effort, categorized Total Full-Protocol Hours per pentad. categories (e.g., 0-1hr, 2-3 hrs, etc.) Example: Mapping Nigeria’s Effort Example: Mapping South Africa’s Effort

title: AfriAtlas Tutorial: Visualizing African Bird Atlas Data
text: map_species() function downloads species sighting data, plots overall coverage, includes widespreadness pie chart top-right corner. Example: Single Species Map (South Africa) Running single species automatically prints generated plot R viewer. Example: Batch Processing (Nigeria) multiple species provided, function saves plots PNG files working directory suppresses graphical output efficiency. output files saved : Common Bulbul_Nigeria.png White-billed Buffalo Weaver_Nigeria.png
code: # Species 846: Pin-tailed Whydah map_species(species_codes = 846, country = "South Africa")

what: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: AfriAtlas R package provides robust, publication-ready tools ecologists enthusiasts download, process, visualize pentad-level bird atlas data African Bird Atlas Project (ABAP) associated country projects (like SABAP2). package designed portability efficiency, handling dynamic boundaries via rnaturalearth package enforcing API safety limits.

title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: can install development version AfriAtlas directly GitHub using remotes package.
code: # Install necessary dependencies if you haven't already if (!requireNamespace("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) {   install.packages("remotes") }  # Install AfriAtlas  remotes::install_github("bdanmallam/AfriAtlas")

title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: mapping functions require numeric Species Codes (e.g., 11491 Common Bulbul). AfriAtlas provides three tools help manage codes.

what: A. Lookup a Code by Name: get_species_code()
title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: know English common name, can quickly retrieve code. function case-sensitive.
code: # Find code for Common Bulbul code <- get_species_code("Common Bulbul") print(code)  # Find code for Pin-tailed Whydah get_species_code("Pin-tailed Whydah")

title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: unsure spelling want browse full species codes, function opens internal dataset RStudio Viewer. (Note: function works interactive sessions).

title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: running batch process, best practice review list codes used. show_codes() function simple utility . Note primary mapping function, map_species(), stop execution list exceeds Spp 10 codes.
code: # Example list of species codes (e.g., common African species) my_species_list <- c(129, 311, 437, 846, 11491, 1168)  # Check the list size show_codes(my_species_list)  # Example of a list exceeding the limit (Will stop map_species() execution) # show_codes(c(1:12))

title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: Generates map species sightings versus coverage, including widespreadness pie chart. Execution halted 10 species requested.
code: library(AfriAtlas)  # Generate a single species map for South Africa (Pin-tailed Whydah) map_species(species_codes = 846, country = "Nigeria")  # Generate maps for a batch of species in Kenya (saved as PNGs) map_species(species_codes = c(129, 311), country = "Kenya")

title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data
text: Generates map showing total full-protocol survey hours (effort) per pentad. Categories dynamically adjusted based maximum effort level found country.
code: # Generate effort map for Nigeria  map_coverage("Nigeria")  # Generate effort map for South Africa  map_coverage("South Africa")

title: Create Species and Effort Maps from African Bird Atlas Project Data

title: Explore Species Codes — explore_species_codes
text: Opens package's species code data viewer.

title: Get Species Code — get_species_code
text: Looks numeric species code given common name.

title: Get Species Code — get_species_code
text: commonName Case-sensitive common name.

title: Get Species Code — get_species_code
text: Integer species code.

title: Map Coverage Effort — map_coverage
text: Maps survey effort (hours) specific country using SABAP2 data. automatically handles ADM1 boundaries dynamic coloring based effort hours.

title: Map Coverage Effort — map_coverage
text: country character string representing country name (e.g., "Nigeria"). scale Scale map boundaries, default "large".

title: Map Coverage Effort — map_coverage
text: Generates PNG file working directory prints map.

title: Map Species Distribution — map_species
text: Generates map species sightings coverage specific country.

title: Map Species Distribution — map_species
text: species_codes numeric vector species codes (max 10). country character string representing country name (e.g., "Nigeria").

title: Show Species Codes — show_codes
text: utility review list species codes batch processing. Checks list exceeds batch limit 10.

title: Show Species Codes — show_codes
text: species_codes numeric vector species codes.

title: Show Species Codes — show_codes
text: Prints number codes lists .

title: Species Codes and Names — species_data
text: dataset containing common names numeric codes bird species.

title: Species Codes and Names — species_data
text: data frame columns: species_code unique numeric identifier species commonName English common name species scientificName scientific name species
